principle: Marketing Control is a graph-rendered execution cockpit. The UI renders this file; lane memory overlays from state.json and append-only execution trail overlays from state.jsonl.

lanes.title: 00 Marketing Master Control
lanes.scope: Routes marketing demands across execution lanes and checks ownership before action.
lanes.summary: Use when the demand is unclear or spans multiple marketing channels.
lanes.next_action: Classify the demand, identify the owning lane, then hand execution to that terminal.
lanes.guardrail: No channel mutation from master unless explicitly requested and live state is verified.

lanes.title: 01 Influencer
lanes.scope: Creator discovery, shortlist, outreach, applications, bookings, and conversion proof.
lanes.summary: May campaign, paid shortlist, Urdu paid push, creator outreach, apply flow, approvals, and bookings are known surfaces.
lanes.next_action: Open for creator profile selection, DM/email/WABA outreach, approval, or booking proof.
lanes.guardrail: Verify template/send gates and live application state before outreach or approval actions.

lanes.title: 02 Google Ads
lanes.scope: Search, PMax, paid landing CTA, Google cockpit, budget/negative keyword work, Maps proof.
lanes.summary: HE Google cockpit and day-wise paid stack analytics are live; Maps/directions proof chain exists.
lanes.next_action: Open when changing budgets, negatives, campaign status, paid landing, or Maps/directions measurement.
lanes.guardrail: Verify account, campaign IDs, budget, delivery state, and cockpit payload before mutation.

lanes.title: 03 Delivery Aggregator
lanes.scope: Zomato/Swiggy delivery positioning, offer readiness, margin gates, menu/photo evidence.
lanes.summary: Deep P0 row intelligence exists, but portal execution stays gated by proof and margin evidence.
lanes.next_action: Open for Zomato/Swiggy offer, price, menu, listing, proof pack, or team-upload packet work.
lanes.guardrail: No blind portal execution. Verify latest platform state, BOM/margin, owner decisions, and proof rows.

lanes.title: 04 Dine-In Aggregator
lanes.scope: GBP, dine-in aggregator, ambience proof, local trust, reservation/payment attribution.
lanes.summary: GBP and dine-in ambience surfaces exist; aggregator platform state must be verified live.
lanes.next_action: Open for ambience, EazyDiner/Zomato Dining/Swiggy Dine-Out, GBP, rating, or KAM action.
lanes.guardrail: Check OTP/login blockers, scraper status, and attribution payload before marking any layer live.

lanes.title: 05 PiSignage
lanes.scope: TV choreography, playlists, upload-ready creative mapping, contact sheets, screen loops.
lanes.summary: TV V2 choreography UI has 7 groups, 28 playlists, 113 asset map, and contact sheets.
lanes.next_action: Open for TV asset correction, upload packet, screen fit, playlist review, or PiSignage mutation.
lanes.guardrail: Live PiSignage mutation is approval-gated; verify dimensions and target screen before upload.

lanes.title: 06 Meta Ads
lanes.scope: Meta CTWA campaigns, retargeting, creative analytics, Maps bridge, adset state.
lanes.summary: CTWA cockpit, Meta-to-Maps bridge, and Hamza Loyalist campaign context exist.
lanes.next_action: Open for campaign budget/status, creative performance, retargeting, Maps bridge, or ad diagnostics.
lanes.guardrail: Verify campaign/adset/ad IDs, delivery, budget, objective, and live cockpit payload before mutation.

lanes.title: 07 Flyers
lanes.scope: A4 flyers, print assets, menu sheets, facade creative, QR design, deterministic design QA.
lanes.summary: HE flyer/facade/menu/QR assets exist across repo, Desktop, Downloads, and archive paths.
lanes.next_action: Open for physical flyer, menu PDF, QR, facade, or print-ready non-packaging output work.
lanes.guardrail: Verify dimensions, resolution, QR decode, text, and export format before final print use.

lanes.title: 08 WABA Outreach
lanes.scope: WhatsApp outreach, inbox, QR/payment/voucher journey, templates, KDS/payment proof.
lanes.summary: HE WABA QR/payment/KDS flow was live-tested; inbox, dashboard, leads, and message architecture surfaces exist.
lanes.next_action: Open for WABA sends, templates, QR flows, voucher journey, payment callback, or KDS message proof.
lanes.guardrail: Verify template status, webhook/payment state, D1/Odoo order state, and test-number exemptions before real sends.

lanes.title: 09 POS Write
lanes.scope: Odoo POS price writes, menu/portion matrix, pricelists, offer templates, KDS/category routing.
lanes.summary: HE prices verified 771/771 rows; Cash Counter offer is 20%; Captain and Ground Floor remain 10%; protected rows stay guarded.
lanes.next_action: Open for Odoo price/menu/offer/category/KDS changes or verification after POS state changes.
lanes.guardrail: Verify target instance, company/config IDs, sessions, open orders, exact row whitelist, and rollback path before write.

lanes.title: 10 Packaging Design
lanes.scope: HE/NCH packaging doctrine, SKU collapse, NCH flask/tuck execution, render control, and vendor handoff.
lanes.summary: Codex lane seeded from actual Claude execution: May HE+NCH packaging intelligence, April NCH flask origin, and April rejection/correction trail.
lanes.next_action: Open for HE Cheap-Bold render correction, NCH flask panel continuation, tuck-box planning, packaging material decisions, or vendor-ready packaging packs.
lanes.guardrail: No bulk panel automation. Read the execution digest and raw Claude trail, then continue panel-by-panel with cost and supplier checks.
